title: hymenoxys texana
intro: Hymenoxys texana, also known as the Texas marigold or Mexican marigold, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems, such as colds and coughs. Hymenoxys texana can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in herbal preparations to create salves and ointments for topical applications.
